data.content: Revised plan (v3) addresses the previous rejection by explicitly listing all 4 .loom files with legacy output declarations, including the previously missed autopilot_with_pr_no_planning.loom. Complete file inventory verified via grep. 7 files changed, ~70 lines. Implementation: ArtifactTarget enum with legacy aliases and unknown rejection, legacy_outputs normalization, TOML/JSON parser validation, and sweep of all 5 legacy output declarations across 4 .loom files.
